title: MD, PhD
biography: Gregg Semenza is an American geneticist who discovered HIF-1, the master regulator of cellular oxygen sensing. Nobel Prize 2019.
aiSummary: Gregg Semenza is a genetics specialist at Johns Hopkins University. Based in Baltimore.

affiliations.role: C. Michael Armstrong Professor of Medicine
